motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Quick response for hover and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #d90f0f; color: #fff; padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b30c0c; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid #eaeaea; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgb(17 17 17 / 0.04); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 14px; color: #777777; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 42px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -1.5px; color: #111111; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: #777777; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: all 150ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-link.active { background: #ffe5e5; color: #d90f0f; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview: The Wecraft design system is built for the high-intensity environment of a physical workshop. It prioritizes data density without sacrificing readability, providing a 'material compass' for artisans to navigate their inventory and orders.
keyCharacteristics: Utility-Led Hierarchy: Critical stats and material totals are oversized and bold.
Breathable Density: Generous whitespace surrounds dense tables to maintain clarity.
Brand Authority: Strategic use of Wecraft Red (#d90f0f) to anchor the user's attention.
Workshop-Ready: High-contrast typography and large touch targets for mobile use.

rules.name: The Red Rarity Rule
rules.body: Wecraft Red should be used for ≤10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Flat-Surface Rule
rules.body: Most UI elements remain flat. Depth is primarily conveyed through borders and tonal shifts.

dos: Do use DM Sans for all UI elements.
Do ensure every table row has a hover state.
Do use the large 14px radius for all main content containers.
donts: Don't use Wecraft Red for non-interactive elements.
Don't fail the mobile test. Every table must be responsive.
